2308710.name: The Lost Edge
2308710.description:
You live in a small village where everything goes as planned. You went to a workers' village on business, but upon your arrival, something went wrong...

Things had already been rough lately due to your work, and upon your arrival, you were informed that your younger sister had left home due to a heated argument.

This seems strange; you had a good time before you left, and as you were leaving, she asked you to come back quickly. Soon after the news, a letter from her arrived.

The only police station was closed, and there was no help to be found. So, you decided to question the locals to find the slightest clue. When you opened the letter, it became clear that she had been kidnapped, and the letter wasn't from her at all. Time is running out; every minute could be crucial in saving her.

GAME FEATURES:

  • Co-op: Invite your friends to play!

  • A convenient inventory where you don't have to sort resources one by one; you can select the required quantity, move it, or discard it.
2308710.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 简体中文, 波兰语, 俄语

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
